settings.title: Settings
settings.notif_cant_disable: Disable notifications in your browser settings.
settings.biometric_desc: Protect vault access with FaceID / Fingerprint
onboarding.s1_desc: Life Switch protects your most important information and ensures it reaches the right people if something happens to you.
onboarding.s2_desc: Every secret is encrypted on your device before being saved. Only you can read your content.
onboarding.s3_desc: Add the people who should receive your secrets. They will only be notified if you stop responding.
onboarding.s4_desc: Press Pulse regularly to show you're active. If you stop, Life Switch will automatically notify your contacts.
library.title: My Library
library.encryption_notice: Everything you save here is encrypted and will only be transmitted in the event of your prolonged absence.
diary.title: Diary
diary.prompt_1: What is your best childhood memory?
diary.prompt_2: What advice would you leave for your loved ones?
diary.prompt_3: What are you most proud of today?
diary.prompt_4: What is your definition of happiness?
vault.title: My Vault
vault.fill_all: Please fill in title and content.
legal_page.title: Privacy & Legal
legal_page.description: At Life Switch, privacy is not a promise, it's an architecture. We protect your digital heritage with the highest military-standard encryption.
legal_page.tos_content: By using Life Switch, you agree to submit regular 'signs of life'. If you do not respond within the defined timeframe, your pre-defined secrets will be transmitted to your chosen contacts. You remain the sole owner of your decryption keys; if lost, your data cannot be recovered by our teams.
legal_page.privacy_intro: Your privacy is protected by the Life Protocol, a set of technological and legal barriers designed to guarantee your total anonymity.
legal_page.privacy_section_a_content: All your secrets and documents are encrypted using the AES-256-GCM algorithm. Decryption is only possible on your device or those of your identified beneficiaries in the event of your absence.
legal_page.privacy_section_b_content: We have no technical access to your data. Neither our developers nor any third party can consult your vault. Your password and biometrics never leave your terminal.
legal_page.privacy_section_c_content: The transmission of secrets is triggered only by your prolonged inactivity. This process is fully automated and requires no human intervention on our part, ensuring the total confidentiality of your instructions.
legal_page.privacy_section_d_content: Your data is hosted on highly redundant infrastructures located exclusively within the European Union (GDPR Zone), benefiting from the strictest legal protections in the world.
legal_page.privacy_section_e_content: Life Switch is a digital public utility service. We do not sell your data, do not use advertising cookies, and perform no algorithmic profiling for commercial purposes.
legal_page.privacy_section_f_content: Messages sent to your beneficiaries are transmitted via secure TLS tunnels. We recommend that your relatives set up two-factor authentication on their own messaging services for optimal security.
legal_page.privacy_section_g_content: Our infrastructure undergoes regular penetration tests. Any major security breach detected will be notified to the concerned users within 72 hours, in accordance with European directives.
legal_page.apple_eula_note: For iOS users, Apple's standard terms (EULA) apply in addition to our TOS.
premium.title: PREMIUM
premium.subtitle: Elevate your legacy security to the standard of excellence.
premium.f1_desc: Protect as many secrets, codes, and memories as you wish.
premium.f2_desc: Send birthday messages to your loved ones for decades.
premium.f3_desc: Transmit your memories in high definition without compression.
premium.f4_desc: Secure vault access with FaceID / Fingerprint.
premium.f5_desc: Direct access to our team for any assistance.
premium.footer: Subscription with no commitment. Cancel anytime in your store account settings.
premium.already_premium_desc: Thank you for your trust. Your legacy is under maximum protection.
premium.test_success: Test Mode: Welcome to Life Switch Premium!
carnet.fallback_reply: I'm here with you. Tell me how you feel... ✨
carnet.save_confirm_desc: Do you want to save this conversation in your encrypted vault?
carnet.report_footer: Report generated and encrypted by Carnet.
